Name: CHR_PHANTOM_PARAM
Description: Defines visual rendering and blending parameters for phantom (ghost-like network entities), including color, lighting response, and transparency behavior.

Fields.Name: Edge Color: Red
Fields.Description: Red channel of the outline (edge) color.

Fields.Name: Edge Color: Green
Fields.Description: Green channel of the outline (edge) color.

Fields.Name: Edge Color: Blue
Fields.Description: Blue channel of the outline (edge) color.

Fields.Name: Edge Color: Alpha
Fields.Description: Opacity of the outline (edge) color.

Fields.Name: Front Color: Red
Fields.Description: Red channel of the main surface color.

Fields.Name: Front Color: Green
Fields.Description: Green channel of the main surface color.

Fields.Name: Front Color: Blue
Fields.Description: Blue channel of the main surface color.

Fields.Name: Front Color: Alpha
Fields.Description: Opacity of the main surface color.

Fields.Name: Diffuse Multiplier: Red
Fields.Description: Red channel used to scale diffuse lighting contribution.

Fields.Name: Diffuse Multiplier: Green
Fields.Description: Green channel used to scale diffuse lighting contribution.

Fields.Name: Diffuse Multiplier: Blue
Fields.Description: Blue channel used to scale diffuse lighting contribution.

Fields.Name: Diffuse Multiplier: Alpha
Fields.Description: Alpha multiplier for diffuse lighting influence.

Fields.Name: Specular Multiplier: Red
Fields.Description: Red channel used to scale specular highlights.

Fields.Name: Specular Multiplier: Green
Fields.Description: Green channel used to scale specular highlights.

Fields.Name: Specular Multiplier: Blue
Fields.Description: Blue channel used to scale specular highlights.

Fields.Name: Specular Multiplier: Alpha
Fields.Description: Alpha multiplier for specular highlight intensity.

Fields.Name: Light Color: Red
Fields.Description: Red channel of the applied lighting tint.

Fields.Name: Light Color: Green
Fields.Description: Green channel of the applied lighting tint.

Fields.Name: Light Color: Blue
Fields.Description: Blue channel of the applied lighting tint.

Fields.Name: Light Color: Alpha
Fields.Description: Opacity of the lighting tint effect.

Fields.Name: Blend Rate
Fields.Description: Controls how strongly phantom rendering blends with the base material.

Fields.Name: Alpha
Fields.Description: Overall transparency of the phantom object.

Fields.Name: Alpha Blend Mode
Fields.Description: Determines the blending method used for transparency rendering.

Fields.Name: Subtract Edge Color
Fields.Description: If enabled, edge color is subtracted instead of added during rendering.

Fields.Name: Subtract Front Color
Fields.Description: If enabled, front surface color is subtracted instead of added during rendering.

Fields.Name: Reserved
Fields.Description: Unused reserved field for future expansion.
